# NLTokenUnit

**Enumeration**

Constants representing linguistic units.

## Declaration

```swift
enum NLTokenUnit
```

## Overview

You use these constants with these methods:

- [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTagger/availableTagSchemes(for:language:)]
- [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTagger/tagsInRange:unit:scheme:options:tokenRanges:]
- [doc://com.apple.naturallanguage/documentation/NaturalLanguage/NLTagger/enumerateTagsInRange:unit:scheme:options:usingBlock:]

## Constants

- **NLTokenUnit.word**: An individual word.
- **NLTokenUnit.sentence**: An individual sentence.
- **NLTokenUnit.paragraph**: An individual paragraph.
- **NLTokenUnit.document**: The document in its entirety.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Determining the range of a unit token

- **tokenRange(at:unit:)**: Returns the range of the linguistic unit containing the specified character index.
- **tokenRange(for:unit:)**: Finds the entire range of all tokens of the specified linguistic unit contained completely or partially within the specified range.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
